name: Christopher Knight Home Chatsworth Storage Ottoman - Navy: Elegant Tufted Design, Soft Polyester Upholstery, Mobile Casters
description: Make your home even more fabulous with a Christopher Knight Home Chatsworth Fabric Storage Ottoman. This contemporary ottoman brings comfort and style to your space with its padded upholstery, square shape and tufting. The top hinges open to give you ample storage space for throw blankets, pillows, toys and more. Versatile and durable, it has a solid wood frame. This square ottoman can double as a coffee table by adding a tray. You can also use it as extra seating in a pinch.
